questions.text: In the context of the cultural history of India, a pose in dance and dramatics called Tribhanga had been a favourite of Indian artists from ancient time till today. Which one of the following statements best describes this pose?

options.text: One leg is bent and the body is slightly but oppositely curved at waist and neck
Facial expressions, hand ges- tures and make-up are com- bined to symbolize certain epic or historical characters
Movements of body, face and hands are used to express one- self or to tell a story
A little smile, slightly curved waist and certain hand gestures are emphasized to express the feelings of love or eroticism

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: One leg is bent and the body is slightly but oppositely curved at waist and neck
